name: Sweet Bread~ Portuguese
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water in a large bowl.
2. Stir in milk, 3/4 cup sugar, salt, 3 eggs, margarine, and 3 cups flour. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining flour (you may need up to an additional cup beyond what is called for) until you have a dough that is easy to handle.
4. Turn out dough onto a floured surface; knead 5 minutes.
5. Place in a greased bowl; turn the greased side up; cover and let rise 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
6. Punch down dough and divide into two.
7. Shape each into a round, slightly flat loaf.
8. Place each loaf in a greased round pan (9 x 10 1/2 inches) that has been greased.
9. Cover and let rise until doubled (about 1 hour).
10. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
11. Beat 1 egg lightly and brush over loaves.
12. Sprinkle with 1 tsp sugar.
13. Bake until loaves are golden brown (35-45 minutes). Makes 2 loaves.
